meaning: Time Division Multiple Access,时分多路寻址技术
examples: An acquisition method of frequency hopping signal in a TDMA system is presented in this paper.
PHS uses TDMA/TDD for its radio channel access method, and 32 kbit/s ADPCM for its voice codec.
The maximum data rates are achieved only by allocation of more than one time slot in the TDMA frame.
Even when you look at cellular phones in the second generation you have four different standards: GSM, TDMA, CDMA, PDC.
